effect.name: DJ Flanger
effect.description:
DJ Flanger (LADSPA 1438)
This is a flanger which is more or less typical of DJ mixing desks
effect.author: Steve Harris (http://www.ladspa.org)

parameter.name: LFO sync
parameter.comment:
When turned from off to on
it resets the phase of the LFO back to the start of the cycle. Used to sync the LFO to the track.

parameter.name: LFO period
parameter.comment: The cycle period of the LFO in seconds

parameter.name: LFO depth
parameter.comment: The maximum delay the LFO will use to flange in milliseconds

parameter.name: Feedback
parameter.comment: The amount of the delays output that is mixed back into the delay
